ops.text: INVALIDATION (2026-07-09): all 'with draft' cells used a degenerate constant draft ('<think>...</think>NO_STEER' from a collapsed 120-iter LoRA; harness raw-string NO_STEER check made it always-fire). Only the no-draft cells stand: opus refiner given context+exemplars but no draft fires 0-1/66 regardless of retrieval config — the frontier stage is ultra-conservative without a local draft. Draft-cell rerun required after LoRA retrain + think-block stripping.
